Home / Design & Creative Tools / Inkscape

Inkscape — open source alternative

Open source vector design — SVG-first.

Strengths

  • Native SVG handling — perfect for developers.
  • Strong path editing and typography.
  • Huge hobbyist and professional community.

Weaknesses

  • Not as polished as Adobe Illustrator.
  • Large files can slow the UI.
  • Limited macro/script discoverability.
License: GPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 1/5 Self-host onlyDesktop: Windows, macOS, Linux

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Inkscape is used as an alternative to

Figma

Collaborative interface design in the browser.

See all alternatives →

Canva

Drag-and-drop graphic design for everyone.

See all alternatives →

Sketch

Mac-first interface design tool.

See all alternatives →
